items.title: Plot twist: Gen Z is buying houses after all. Here’s how they’re doing it.
items.description: Despite soaring housing costs, younger buyers are finding a way in.

items.title: Rivian’s stock sale triggers worst rout for the shares in nearly two years
items.description: Rivian’s stock falls 18% as Wall Street frets about the EV maker’s cash troubles.

items.title: ‘Our family is broken beyond repair’: My brother took over my parents’ finances. What can I do?
items.description: “Without telling me, my brother petitioned for sole guardianship of our mother.”

items.title: Micron’s stock falls as investors wonder if the memory market is near the top
items.description: “Most investor feedback continues to point to a skittish AI tape,” one analyst said.

items.title: Adobe’s stock is temptingly cheap. Should investors bite?
items.description: Adobe has become a polarizing stock in the face of questions about its AI future.

items.title: AI-related debt sells off sharply as Amazon looks to borrow another $25 billion
items.description: Bonds financing the massive artificial-intelligence buildout were hit hard by selling on Tuesday, as Amazon.com set out to borrow another $25 billion in new debt.

items.title: Tesla’s stock could rise 20% thanks to the potential for a SpaceX merger, analyst says
items.description: Some on Wall Street see an increasing likelihood that Elon Musk’s two biggest companies will combine.

items.title: Crude prices rise as U.S. launches strikes on Iran shortly after canceling its license to sell oil
items.description: Oil futures climbed late Tuesday after the Treasury Department canceled a license granted on June 21 to allow for the sale of Iranian oil.

items.title: Think the U.S. stock market is too heavily exposed to AI? It’s even worse abroad.
items.description: Stock-market concentration is hardly just an issue in the U.S.

items.title: GameStop investors clear the way for a fresh attempt at buying eBay
items.description: Shareholders approved a change that will let the video-game retailer issue more stock.
